hero.title: About Icon Finance
hero.description: We are an independent wealth management and family office advisory firm, built for clients who expect more than a product — and deserve more than a bank.

philosophy.title: What We Believe
philosophy.subtitle: Three principles guide every relationship, every recommendation, and every decision we make on your behalf.

items.title: Client Interests Above All
items.description: We act as fiduciaries — always. Our independence from banks, funds, and product providers means every recommendation we make is driven by your goals alone.

items.title: Long-Term Relationships
items.description: We measure our success in decades, not transactions. Our clients stay with us because we earn that relationship every year — not because they are locked in.

items.title: Confidentiality and Trust
items.description: Your affairs are yours. We treat client information with absolute discretion — as a professional obligation and a personal one.

story.title:
Built Over Time.
Refined by Experience.
story.description: From a small Warsaw practice to an independent multi-disciplinary firm — every chapter of our story has been shaped by client needs.

steps.title: Foundation
steps.result: Independent advice, no conflicts of interest
activities: Founders from private banking and asset management

members.name: Oleg Zabolotnyi
members.bio: Founder of Icon Finance with a background in private banking and investment advisory. Oleg built the firm around a single principle: independent advice that serves clients — not institutions.

members.name: Yurii Labenko
members.bio: Yurii leads the firm's operations and client strategy. His experience spans investment management and financial advisory across Central and Eastern European markets.

members.name: Ksenia Romanchuk
members.bio: Ksenia drives the firm's growth and partnership strategy. She brings deep expertise in building institutional-grade client relationships across private wealth markets.

members.name: Maksym Sydorov
members.bio: Maksym develops and manages Icon Finance's partner network — connecting clients with the right specialists across legal, tax, and investment disciplines.

cta.title: Start a Confidential Conversation
cta.description: Arrange a private consultation with our team. We will listen to your situation first — and only propose a path forward if we are confident we can add meaningful value.

hero.title:
Decades of Experience.
One Integrated Team.
hero.description: We bring together specialists in wealth management, family office, structuring, tax, and corporate advisory — working as one team around each client's complete financial life.

items.title: Wealth Management
items.body: Independent investment management and portfolio advisory for entrepreneurs and families. No product commissions. No institutional quotas. Only advice aligned with your goals.

items.title: Family Office
items.body: We design and operate family office structures for multi-generational families — coordinating investments, governance, succession, and reporting from a single point.

items.title: Structuring & Tax
items.body: International wealth structuring and tax planning across multiple jurisdictions — designed to protect assets, reduce unnecessary tax drag, and ensure full legal compliance.

items.title: Corporate Advisory
items.body: M&A advisory, exit planning, capital raising, and due diligence for business owners — from early growth through to final transaction close.

items.title: Entrepreneurs & Founders
items.body: Business owners navigating the intersection of personal and corporate wealth at every stage of growth.

items.title: Multi-Generational Families
items.body: Families managing wealth across two or three generations with complex governance and succession needs.

items.title: International Clients
items.body: Individuals and families with assets, residency, and interests spread across multiple jurisdictions.

items.title: Post-Exit Principals
items.body: Founders and executives following a liquidity event who need disciplined capital deployment and protection.

items.title: Philanthropists
items.body: Families and individuals seeking to deploy capital for lasting impact through structured giving.

items.title: Corporate & Institutional
items.body: Companies and family businesses requiring independent M&A, capital, and restructuring advisory.

international.title: Where We Work
international.description: Our clients' lives do not stop at one border — and neither does our expertise. We coordinate across jurisdictions, time zones, and regulatory frameworks to give clients a single coherent view of their international wealth.

cta.title: Start a Confidential Conversation
cta.description: Arrange a private consultation with our team. We will listen to your situation first — and only propose a path forward if we are confident we can add meaningful value.

hero.title: Perspectives on Wealth, Markets, and Strategy
hero.description: Expert commentary from the Icon Finance team on markets, structuring, family office, and the forces shaping private wealth.

ctaSection.title: Want Our Analysis Delivered Directly?
ctaSection.description: We publish market perspectives and expert commentary for clients and subscribers. Reach out to be added to our distribution list.

hero.title: Start a Confidential Conversation
hero.description: We listen first. We only propose a path forward when we are confident we can add meaningful value to your situation.

blocks.title: Response Time
blocks.body: We respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.

blocks.title: Confidentiality
blocks.body: All information shared with us is treated with strict professional discretion. NDA available on request.

form.title: Send Us a Message
form.subtitle: Leave an inquiry and our expert will contact you within 24 hours.
form.subject: Subject
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your situation — assets, goals, timeline, or anything else relevant.
form.footnote: We respond within 24 hours. All information is strictly confidential.

errors.subject: Please select a subject
errors.message: Please add a bit more detail

form.success: Message sent. We will respond within 24 hours.

bottomCTA.title: Not Sure Where to Start?
bottomCTA.description: Many of our clients come to us without a clear brief — just a sense that their current situation could be better managed. That is a perfectly good place to begin.
